provisions.description: Transitional Lot — special standards, NOT general lot standards
provisions.text: Transitional lots contain existing ground slopes of 15% or greater anywhere on the lot. Per Sec. 78-14 of the Zoning Ordinance, no residence shall be built on a transitional lot without a detailed site plan prepared by a professional engineer or landscape architect licensed by the State of Tennessee.

provisions.text: 9.3 Turning Radius and Turnaround

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Driveway turning radius and turnaround requirements per Section 9.3: the code requirement for minimum inside turning radius is 20 feet. An acceptable minimum of 14 to 15 feet may be permitted when site constraints exist. Turnarounds shall be a minimum of 30-foot diameter, or 24-foot diameter with a dovetail configuration.

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Acceptable driveway culvert materials and minimum standards per Section 9.4: Corrugated Metal Pipe (CMP) must be aluminized coated to AASHTO M-274 standard, 14-gauge minimum. High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) must meet AASHTO M-294-02. Minimum culvert diameter is 18 inches.

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Retaining wall height limits per Section 10.1: the maximum wall height inside the buildable area is 10 feet. The maximum wall height outside the buildable area is 6 feet.

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: 10.2 Engineering Requirements

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Safety barrier requirements for retaining walls per Section 10.3: when the grade difference at the top of the wall exceeds 30 inches, a safety barrier is required. For grade differences of 30 to 60 inches, guard rails or dense hedge planting between 30 and 60 inches in height are acceptable. For grade differences greater than 60 inches, guard rails are required.

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Fence height limits per Section 11.1 (Sec. 78-10): the maximum fence height in the front yard or side street yard is 4 feet. The maximum height in other locations is 6 feet. The maximum height for a patio or deck enclosure is 8 feet.

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Pool de-chlorination requirements per Section 12.2 (Sec. 56-44): stop adding chlorine and allow 7 to 10 days for natural dissipation. Test to confirm chlorine level is less than 1 PPM (ideally 0 PPM) before discharge. Discharge to grassy areas only, not directly to storm drains. Salt water pools must discharge to the sanitary sewer system; coordinate with Water Services.

provisions.description: References another section of the code

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: 14.2 Basement Coverage Calculation

provisions.description: References another section of the code
provisions.text: Basement coverage calculation method per Section 14.2: measure the total perimeter length of the basement walls; measure the length of the perimeter that is at or below existing grade; divide the at-or-below-grade length by the total perimeter length; the result must be 50 percent or greater.
